---
title: "Algorithmic Trading: Winning Strategies and Their Rationale"
subtitle: "By Ernest P. Chan"
page-layout: article
---

# Purpose

This directory is a minimal Quarto stack for a quant lecture workflow:

- `chapters/` for chapter and section source files
- `video-lesson-slides.qmd` for section-level reveal.js slides
- `web-notes.qmd` for browser reading notes
- `pdf-notes.qmd` for printable notes

The goal is one content stack with different presentation styles:

- video output favors pacing, fragments, notes, and autoplay
- web/PDF output favors completeness, readability, and review

# Why This Stack

It covers the constraints that matter for a quant course:

- LaTeX-style math without writing full Beamer
- executable Python code blocks when you want them
- chart-heavy content: PnL, drawdown, histograms, rolling metrics
- code snippets with syntax highlighting
- speaker notes that can double as a TTS script source
- web publishing and PDF export from the same project

# Files

- [Chapter Index](chapters/index.qmd)
- [1.1 The Importance of Backtesting](chapters/chapter-01/sections/01-the-importance-of-backtesting/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats:
  [video](chapters/chapter-01/sections/01-the-importance-of-backtesting/video-lesson-slides.qmd),
  [PDF](chapters/chapter-01/sections/01-the-importance-of-backtesting/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [1.2 Common Pitfalls of Backtesting](chapters/chapter-01/sections/02-common-pitfalls-of-backtesting/web-notes.qmd)  
  Alternate formats:
  [video](chapters/chapter-01/sections/02-common-pitfalls-of-backtesting/video-lesson-slides.qmd),
  [PDF](chapters/chapter-01/sections/02-common-pitfalls-of-backtesting/pdf-notes.qmd)
- [Project README](README.md)

# Chapter-Section Structure

Web reading pages live under `chapters/`:

```text
chapters/
  chapter-01/
    index.qmd
    sections/
      01-the-importance-of-backtesting/
        video-lesson-slides.qmd
        web-notes.qmd
        pdf-notes.qmd
```

Add new chapters by copying that pattern, then add the pages to the website
sidebar via `scripts/sync-section-structure.sh`.

# Suggested Workflow

1. Create one folder per section under `chapters/chapter-xx/sections/`.
2. Keep each chapter landing page at `chapters/chapter-xx/index.qmd`.
3. Adapt the main teaching flow into each section's `video-lesson-slides.qmd`.
4. Keep speaker script inside slide notes blocks.
5. Move derivations, caveats, and extra charts into `web-notes.qmd` and
   `pdf-notes.qmd`.
6. Generate TTS audio from notes and align durations to slide `auto-slide`.
7. Publish `_site/` to GitHub Pages and export PDF for offline reading.
